leaders.name: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Remote Work Tech Issues Precedes Tech Sector Pullback
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Rising searches for remote work tech problems indicate user dissatisfaction, presaging softness in tech demand.

leaders.name: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Home Office Setup Signals Bullish Technology Sector
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Increasing interest in home office setups signals sustained demand for technology hardware and software products.

leaders.name: Daily Spike In Rss News Count For Semiconductor Equipment Orders Signals Chip Sector Rebound
leaders.thesis_one_liner: A 40%+ daily jump in news stories about semiconductor equipment orders implies renewed capital expenditure.

leaders.name: Cyber Incident Notification Law Awareness Google Trends Spike
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in search interest for breach notification and privacy law compliance often follow major incidents and correlate with rising cybersecurity spending and regulatory pressure sentiment.

leaders.name: Ai Chatbot Hype Surge Triggers Tech Sector Rally
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in AI/chatbot searches correlate with retail investor attention shifts toward tech and AI-exposed companies.

leaders.name: Retail Sales Momentum
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Retail Sales Momentum tests whether consumer behavior can reveal consumer stress or demand rotation before it shows up in sector performance.

leaders.name: Weekly Surge In Google Trends Searches For Home Improvement Loan Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Xly
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in home improvement loans often signals increased consumer willingness to spend on discretionary housing-related retail items.

leaders.name: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Emergency Dental Care Signals Consumer Stress Impacting Health Sector
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Increased emergency dental queries indicate rising consumer health emergencies and cost stress.

leaders.name: Google Trends Surge In Used Car Price Searches
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Spike in searches for used car pricing signals consumer anxiety about vehicle affordability and resale values, often preceding used car market weakness.

leaders.name: Healthcare Cost Inflation Google Trends Acceleration
leaders.thesis_one_liner: When combined search index for healthcare cost anxiety spikes 80%+ above 8-week baseline, it signals consumer stress, pressuring discretionary spending and benefiting defensive healthcare.

leaders.name: Algo Biscotti (Unconditional Loyalty)
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Algo Biscotti (Unconditional Loyalty) tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.

leaders.name: Quantified Simple Monthly Rotation
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Quantified Simple Monthly Rotation tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.

leaders.name: Algo Baileymol (Chaos Monger)
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Algo Baileymol (Chaos Monger) tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.

leaders.name: Antonacci Dual Momentum Sector Rotation
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Antonacci Dual Momentum Sector Rotation tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.

leaders.name: Faber Momentum Rotation
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Faber Momentum Rotation tests whether systematic price rotation can capture persistent sector momentum better than passive market exposure.

leaders.name: Truck Tonnage Index
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Truck Tonnage Index tests whether logistics activity can reveal real-economy demand shifts before they appear in sector ETF momentum.

leaders.name: Usgs Earthquake Activity Spike Near Major Freight Hubs Signals Temporary Freight Disruption
leaders.thesis_one_liner: A sudden increase in earthquake tremors near major freight hubs can disrupt logistics and shipping routes, impacting industrial production.

leaders.name: Daily Spike In Earthquake Activity Near Major Port Hubs Signals Freight Logistics Risk
leaders.thesis_one_liner: A sudden increase in earthquakes near key port hubs can disrupt freight logistics and container throughput.

leaders.name: Weekly Spike In Rss News Counts On Port Labor Strikes Signals Freight Logistics Disruption
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Increased media coverage of port labor strikes correlates with short-term shipping delays and inventory bottlenecks.

leaders.name: Cardboard Box Index
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Cardboard Box Index tests whether source data can reveal real-economy demand shifts before they appear in sector ETF momentum.

leaders.name: Recession Whisper Google Trends Unemployment Search Surge
leaders.thesis_one_liner: When combined search interest in unemployment + layoff terms spikes >40% above 52-week baseline in a single week, consumer anxiety peaks.

leaders.name: Daily Surge In Google Trends For Work From Office Signals Tech Sector Rotation
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in returning to office often signals changing corporate policies impacting tech productivity and sentiment.

leaders.name: Weekly Jump In Rss News Counts Mentioning Corporate Wage Hikes Signals Labor Cost Pressure
leaders.thesis_one_liner: An increase in news on wage hikes signals rising labor costs that can compress corporate margins.

leaders.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Job Quit Searches Signals Rising Labor Market Churn
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Increased job quit searches reflect rising employee turnover and labor market fluidity.

leaders.name: Daily Jump In Google Trends For Job Market Reskilling Courses Indicates Labor Market Shift
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Spikes in job reskilling searches suggest workers anticipating layoffs or sector shifts, increasing labor market uncertainty.

leaders.name: Weekly Google Trends Surge For Warehouse Automation Signals Industrial Tech Demand Acceleration
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Growing interest in warehouse automation indicates accelerating industrial technology adoption and capex.

leaders.name: Weekly Google Trends Surge For Solar Panel Installation Signals Green Energy Sector Strength
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Rising interest in solar installations reflects increased consumer and commercial investment in renewables.

leaders.name: Earthquake Aftershock Insurance Claims Spike
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Clusters of moderate earthquakes in populated regions trigger immediate insurance claim filings and property damage estimates, creating short-term sector rotation into insurance and repair stocks.

leaders.name: Earthquake Activity Cluster Signal For Insurance And Utility Sector
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Weekly earthquake count in California, Pacific Northwest, or Intermountain zones exceeds historical median by >60%, signaling heightened seismic risk.

leaders.name: Daily Spike In Earthquake Activity Near Key Ports Signals Potential Shipping Disruptions
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Sudden increase in seismic activity near key ports can disrupt freight logistics and supply chains temporarily.

leaders.name: Algo Biscotti (Unconditional Loyalty)
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Algo Biscotti (Unconditional Loyalty) tests whether source data can expose input-cost, demand, or regime pressure before sector ETFs fully react.

leaders.name: High Yield Spread Regime
leaders.thesis_one_liner: High Yield Spread Regime tests whether macro data can expose input-cost, demand, or regime pressure before sector ETFs fully react.

leaders.name: Housing Permit Velocity
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Housing Permit Velocity tests whether source data can expose input-cost, demand, or regime pressure before sector ETFs fully react.

leaders.name: Earthquake Aftershock Amplifier
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Significant earthquake events can trigger increased aftershock activity, which may signal volatility and uncertainty in energy and industrial sectors.

leaders.name: Daily Price Spike In Energy Sector Etf After Surge In Usgs Earthquake Activity In Oil Regions
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Increased seismic activity near oil production areas can temporarily disrupt supply, causing short-term energy price spikes.

leaders.name: Bank Equity Sector Outperformance After Cre Distress News Fade Signals Recovery Trade
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Daily CRE distress news count spikes >150% above 20-day average, then fades by >60% day-over-day 3-5 days later.

leaders.name: Materials Sector Weekly Positive Correlation Breakdown With Xlb
leaders.thesis_one_liner: When XLB weekly returns decouple negatively from SPY returns for 2 consecutive weeks, a rebound in XLB often follows.

leaders.name: Energy Sector Sudden Weekly Volatility Spike
leaders.thesis_one_liner: A 50%+ weekly spike in realized volatility often precedes strong directional moves in energy stocks.

leaders.name: Congress Trading Fade
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Congress Trading Fade tests whether filing or policy activity can expose forced flows or informed positioning before broad sector moves.

leaders.name: Bankruptcy Filing Rate
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Bankruptcy Filing Rate tests whether filing or policy activity can expose forced flows or informed positioning before broad sector moves.

leaders.name: Uber Mobility Index
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Uber Mobility Index tests whether source data can identify travel and mobility demand changes before transport-linked sectors reprice.

leaders.name: Google Trends Surge In Flight Delay Complaints
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Sharp spikes in Google search volume for flight delay complaints signal operational stress in airlines and airports, often preceding earnings pressure or guidance cuts.

leaders.name: Airport Passenger Traffic Surge From Google Trends Spring Break Bookings
leaders.thesis_one_liner: In February-March, spikes in spring break travel searches lead actual bookings by 1-2 weeks, signaling near-term surge in travel/hospitality demand.

leaders.name: Airline Load Factor Proxy
leaders.thesis_one_liner: Airline Load Factor Proxy tests whether source data can identify travel and mobility demand changes before transport-linked sectors reprice.

leaders.name: Airline Fuel Cost Volatility Expansion
leaders.thesis_one_liner: When XLE 20-day volatility exceeds 25% while XLU 20-day volatility stays <15%, airline cost uncertainty spikes, pressuring airline margins and travel demand.
